pergunta: Qual foi a demanda recebida (total de contatos demandados) no período de 08 a 12 de junho de 2026, nas áreas BK, DN, EC, SAC - CA e SAC - Pessoalize, nos canais Chat, Email, Telefone, Web e Whatsapp?
gabarito_sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(fact_service_metrics.count_of_demanded), 0) AS fact_service_metrics_sum_of_demanded FROM `gold_serve.fact_service_metrics` AS fact_service_metrics LEFT JOIN `contaazul-ssbi.gold_common.dim_date` AS dim_date ON fact_service_metrics.nk_event_date = dim_date.nk_date WHERE (fact_service_metrics.area) IN ('BK', 'DN', 'EC', 'SAC - CA', 'SAC - Pessoalize') AND (fact_service_metrics.channel) IN ('Chat', 'Email', 'Telefone', 'Web', 'Whatsapp') AND (((dim_date.nk_date) >= (DATE('2026-06-08')) AND (dim_date.nk_date) < (DATE('2026-06-13'))))

pergunta: Qual foi a demanda atendida total no período de 08 a 12 de junho de 2026, nas áreas BK, DN, EC, SAC - CA e SAC - Pessoalize, nos canais Chat, Email, Telefone, Web e Whatsapp?
gabarito_sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(fact_service_metrics.count_of_attended), 0) AS fact_service_metrics_sum_of_attended FROM `gold_serve.fact_service_metrics` AS fact_service_metrics LEFT JOIN `contaazul-ssbi.gold_common.dim_date` AS dim_date ON fact_service_metrics.nk_event_date = dim_date.nk_date WHERE (fact_service_metrics.area) IN ('BK', 'DN', 'EC', 'SAC - CA', 'SAC - Pessoalize') AND (fact_service_metrics.channel) IN ('Chat', 'Email', 'Telefone', 'Web', 'Whatsapp') AND (((dim_date.nk_date) >= (DATE('2026-06-08')) AND (dim_date.nk_date) < (DATE('2026-06-13'))))

pergunta: Qual foi o percentual de abandono geral (abandonos ÷ demanda recebida) no período de 08 a 12 de junho de 2026, nas áreas BK, DN, EC, SAC - CA e SAC - Pessoalize, nos canais Chat, Email, Telefone, Web e Whatsapp? Responda como decimal entre 0 e 1.
gabarito_sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(fact_service_metrics.count_of_abandoned), 0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(SUM(fact_service_metrics.count_of_demanded), 0), 0) AS fact_service_metrics_percent_of_abandoned FROM `gold_serve.fact_service_metrics` AS fact_service_metrics LEFT JOIN `contaazul-ssbi.gold_common.dim_date` AS dim_date ON fact_service_metrics.nk_event_date = dim_date.nk_date WHERE (fact_service_metrics.area) IN ('BK', 'DN', 'EC', 'SAC - CA', 'SAC - Pessoalize') AND (fact_service_metrics.channel) IN ('Chat', 'Email', 'Telefone', 'Web', 'Whatsapp') AND (((dim_date.nk_date) >= (DATE('2026-06-08')) AND (dim_date.nk_date) < (DATE('2026-06-13'))))

pergunta: Qual foi o tempo médio de espera (TME) geral, expresso em dias, no período de 08 a 12 de junho de 2026, nas áreas BK, DN, EC, SAC - CA e SAC - Pessoalize, considerando apenas os canais Whatsapp, Telefone e Chat?
gabarito_sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN (fact_service_metrics.channel IN ('Whatsapp', 'Telefone', 'Chat')) THEN fact_service_metrics.sum_of_te ELSE NULL END), 0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN (fact_service_metrics.channel IN ('Whatsapp', 'Telefone', 'Chat')) THEN fact_service_metrics.count_of_demanded ELSE NULL END), 0), 0) / (24 * 60 * 60) AS fact_service_metrics_tme_days FROM `gold_serve.fact_service_metrics` AS fact_service_metrics LEFT JOIN `contaazul-ssbi.gold_common.dim_date` AS dim_date ON fact_service_metrics.nk_event_date = dim_date.nk_date WHERE (fact_service_metrics.area) IN ('BK', 'DN', 'EC', 'SAC - CA', 'SAC - Pessoalize') AND (fact_service_metrics.channel) IN ('Chat', 'Email', 'Telefone', 'Web', 'Whatsapp') AND (((dim_date.nk_date) >= (DATE('2026-06-08')) AND (dim_date.nk_date) < (DATE('2026-06-13'))))

gabarito_sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN (fact_service_metrics.channel IN ('Whatsapp', 'Telefone', 'Chat')) THEN fact_service_metrics.sum_of_ta ELSE NULL END), 0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN (fact_service_metrics.channel IN ('Whatsapp', 'Telefone', 'Chat')) THEN fact_service_metrics.count_of_attended ELSE NULL END), 0), 0) / (24 * 60 * 60) AS fact_service_metrics_tma_days FROM `gold_serve.fact_service_metrics` AS fact_service_metrics LEFT JOIN `contaazul-ssbi.gold_common.dim_date` AS dim_date ON fact_service_metrics.nk_event_date = dim_date.nk_date WHERE (fact_service_metrics.area) IN ('BK', 'DN', 'EC', 'SAC - CA', 'SAC - Pessoalize') AND (fact_service_metrics.channel) IN ('Chat', 'Email', 'Telefone', 'Web', 'Whatsapp') AND (((dim_date.nk_date) >= (DATE('2026-06-08')) AND (dim_date.nk_date) < (DATE('2026-06-13'))))

pergunta: Qual foi o CSAT geral (avaliações positivas ÷ total de avaliações) no período de 08 a 12 de junho de 2026, nas áreas BK, DN, EC, SAC - CA e SAC - Pessoalize, nos canais Chat, Email, Telefone, Web e Whatsapp? Responda como decimal entre 0 e 1.
gabarito_sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(fact_service_metrics.count_of_positive_ratings), 0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(SUM(fact_service_metrics.count_of_positive_ratings), 0) + COALESCE(SUM(fact_service_metrics.count_of_negative_ratings), 0), 0) AS fact_service_metrics_csat FROM `gold_serve.fact_service_metrics` AS fact_service_metrics LEFT JOIN `contaazul-ssbi.gold_common.dim_date` AS dim_date ON fact_service_metrics.nk_event_date = dim_date.nk_date WHERE (fact_service_metrics.area) IN ('BK', 'DN', 'EC', 'SAC - CA', 'SAC - Pessoalize') AND (fact_service_metrics.channel) IN ('Chat', 'Email', 'Telefone', 'Web', 'Whatsapp') AND (((dim_date.nk_date) >= (DATE('2026-06-08')) AND (dim_date.nk_date) < (DATE('2026-06-13'))))

gabarito_sql: SELECT (COALESCE(SUM(fact_service_metrics.count_of_positive_ratings), 0) + COALESCE(SUM(fact_service_metrics.count_of_negative_ratings), 0)) / NULLIF(COALESCE(SUM(fact_service_metrics.count_of_attended), 0), 0) AS fact_service_metrics_percent_of_avaliation FROM `gold_serve.fact_service_metrics` AS fact_service_metrics LEFT JOIN `contaazul-ssbi.gold_common.dim_date` AS dim_date ON fact_service_metrics.nk_event_date = dim_date.nk_date WHERE (fact_service_metrics.area) IN ('BK', 'DN', 'EC', 'SAC - CA', 'SAC - Pessoalize') AND (fact_service_metrics.channel) IN ('Chat', 'Email', 'Telefone', 'Web', 'Whatsapp') AND (((dim_date.nk_date) >= (DATE('2026-06-08')) AND (dim_date.nk_date) < (DATE('2026-06-13'))))

pergunta: Qual foi a demanda recebida pelo chatbot (total de interações) no período de 08 a 12 de junho de 2026, no departamento Servir, nos canais Chat, Web e Whatsapp?
gabarito_sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(dim_chatbot.sum_of_interactions), 0) AS dim_chatbot_count_of_interactions FROM `gold_serve.dim_chatbot` AS dim_chatbot LEFT JOIN `contaazul-ssbi.gold_common.dim_date` AS dim_date ON dim_chatbot.nk_date = dim_date.nk_date WHERE (dim_chatbot.channel) IN ('Chat', 'Web', 'Whatsapp') AND (dim_chatbot.bot_departament) = 'Servir' AND (((dim_date.nk_date) >= (DATE('2026-06-08')) AND (dim_date.nk_date) < (DATE('2026-06-13'))))

pergunta: Qual foi o total de transbordos do chatbot no período de 08 a 12 de junho de 2026, no departamento Servir, nos canais Chat, Web e Whatsapp?
gabarito_sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(dim_chatbot.sum_of_transfers), 0) AS dim_chatbot_count_of_transfers FROM `gold_serve.dim_chatbot` AS dim_chatbot LEFT JOIN `contaazul-ssbi.gold_common.dim_date` AS dim_date ON dim_chatbot.nk_date = dim_date.nk_date WHERE (dim_chatbot.channel) IN ('Chat', 'Web', 'Whatsapp') AND (dim_chatbot.bot_departament) = 'Servir' AND (((dim_date.nk_date) >= (DATE('2026-06-08')) AND (dim_date.nk_date) < (DATE('2026-06-13'))))

gabarito_sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(dim_chatbot.sum_of_total_ratings), 0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(SUM(dim_chatbot.sum_of_interactions), 0), 0) AS dim_chatbot_rated_demands FROM `gold_serve.dim_chatbot` AS dim_chatbot LEFT JOIN `contaazul-ssbi.gold_common.dim_date` AS dim_date ON dim_chatbot.nk_date = dim_date.nk_date WHERE (dim_chatbot.channel) IN ('Chat', 'Web', 'Whatsapp') AND (dim_chatbot.bot_departament) = 'Servir' AND (((dim_date.nk_date) >= (DATE('2026-06-08')) AND (dim_date.nk_date) < (DATE('2026-06-13'))))

gabarito_sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(dim_chatbot.sum_of_positive_ratings), 0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(SUM(dim_chatbot.sum_of_total_ratings), 0), 0) AS dim_chatbot_csat FROM `gold_serve.dim_chatbot` AS dim_chatbot LEFT JOIN `contaazul-ssbi.gold_common.dim_date` AS dim_date ON dim_chatbot.nk_date = dim_date.nk_date WHERE (dim_chatbot.channel) IN ('Chat', 'Web', 'Whatsapp') AND (dim_chatbot.bot_departament) = 'Servir' AND (((dim_date.nk_date) >= (DATE('2026-06-08')) AND (dim_date.nk_date) < (DATE('2026-06-13'))))

gabarito_sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(dim_chatbot.sum_of_negative_ratings), 0) AS dim_chatbot_count_of_negative_ratings FROM `gold_serve.dim_chatbot` AS dim_chatbot LEFT JOIN `contaazul-ssbi.gold_common.dim_date` AS dim_date ON dim_chatbot.nk_date = dim_date.nk_date WHERE (dim_chatbot.channel) IN ('Chat', 'Web', 'Whatsapp') AND (dim_chatbot.bot_departament) = 'Servir' AND (((dim_date.nk_date) >= (DATE('2026-06-08')) AND (dim_date.nk_date) < (DATE('2026-06-13'))))

pergunta: Qual foi a taxa de retenção do chatbot (1 menos a razão entre transbordos e interações) no período de 08 a 12 de junho de 2026, no departamento Servir, nos canais Chat, Web e Whatsapp? Responda como decimal entre 0 e 1.
gabarito_sql: SELECT GREATEST(1 - COALESCE(SUM(dim_chatbot.sum_of_transfers), 0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(SUM(dim_chatbot.sum_of_interactions), 0), 0), 0) AS dim_chatbot_pct_retention FROM `gold_serve.dim_chatbot` AS dim_chatbot LEFT JOIN `contaazul-ssbi.gold_common.dim_date` AS dim_date ON dim_chatbot.nk_date = dim_date.nk_date WHERE (dim_chatbot.channel) IN ('Chat', 'Web', 'Whatsapp') AND (dim_chatbot.bot_departament) = 'Servir' AND (((dim_date.nk_date) >= (DATE('2026-06-08')) AND (dim_date.nk_date) < (DATE('2026-06-13'))))

pergunta: Quantos contatos únicos (clientes distintos) o chatbot atendeu no período de 08 a 12 de junho de 2026, no departamento Servir, nos canais Chat, Web e Whatsapp?
gabarito_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(dim_chatbot.nk_company_id, dim_chatbot.nk_accountancy_id)) AS dim_chatbot_count_of_distinct_customers FROM `gold_serve.dim_chatbot` AS dim_chatbot LEFT JOIN `contaazul-ssbi.gold_common.dim_date` AS dim_date ON dim_chatbot.nk_date = dim_date.nk_date WHERE (dim_chatbot.channel) IN ('Chat', 'Web', 'Whatsapp') AND (dim_chatbot.bot_departament) = 'Servir' AND (((dim_date.nk_date) >= (DATE('2026-06-08')) AND (dim_date.nk_date) < (DATE('2026-06-13'))))

pergunta: Qual foi a demanda recebida pelo chatbot (total de interações) no período de 08 a 12 de junho de 2026, no departamento Retenção, nos canais Chat, Web e Whatsapp?
gabarito_sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(dim_chatbot.sum_of_interactions), 0) AS dim_chatbot_count_of_interactions FROM `gold_serve.dim_chatbot` AS dim_chatbot LEFT JOIN `contaazul-ssbi.gold_common.dim_date` AS dim_date ON dim_chatbot.nk_date = dim_date.nk_date WHERE (dim_chatbot.channel) IN ('Chat', 'Web', 'Whatsapp') AND (dim_chatbot.bot_departament) = 'Retenção' AND (((dim_date.nk_date) >= (DATE('2026-06-08')) AND (dim_date.nk_date) < (DATE('2026-06-13'))))

pergunta: Qual foi o total de transbordos do chatbot no período de 08 a 12 de junho de 2026, no departamento Retenção, nos canais Chat, Web e Whatsapp?
gabarito_sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(dim_chatbot.sum_of_transfers), 0) AS dim_chatbot_count_of_transfers FROM `gold_serve.dim_chatbot` AS dim_chatbot LEFT JOIN `contaazul-ssbi.gold_common.dim_date` AS dim_date ON dim_chatbot.nk_date = dim_date.nk_date WHERE (dim_chatbot.channel) IN ('Chat', 'Web', 'Whatsapp') AND (dim_chatbot.bot_departament) = 'Retenção' AND (((dim_date.nk_date) >= (DATE('2026-06-08')) AND (dim_date.nk_date) < (DATE('2026-06-13'))))

pergunta: Qual foi o percentual de demandas avaliadas (total de avaliações ÷ total de interações) do chatbot no período de 08 a 12 de junho de 2026, no departamento Retenção, nos canais Chat, Web e Whatsapp? Responda como decimal entre 0 e 1.
gabarito_sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(dim_chatbot.sum_of_total_ratings), 0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(SUM(dim_chatbot.sum_of_interactions), 0), 0) AS dim_chatbot_rated_demands FROM `gold_serve.dim_chatbot` AS dim_chatbot LEFT JOIN `contaazul-ssbi.gold_common.dim_date` AS dim_date ON dim_chatbot.nk_date = dim_date.nk_date WHERE (dim_chatbot.channel) IN ('Chat', 'Web', 'Whatsapp') AND (dim_chatbot.bot_departament) = 'Retenção' AND (((dim_date.nk_date) >= (DATE('2026-06-08')) AND (dim_date.nk_date) < (DATE('2026-06-13'))))

pergunta: Qual foi o CSAT do chatbot (avaliações positivas ÷ total de avaliações) no período de 08 a 12 de junho de 2026, no departamento Retenção, nos canais Chat, Web e Whatsapp? Responda como decimal entre 0 e 1.
gabarito_sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(dim_chatbot.sum_of_positive_ratings), 0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(SUM(dim_chatbot.sum_of_total_ratings), 0), 0) AS dim_chatbot_csat FROM `gold_serve.dim_chatbot` AS dim_chatbot LEFT JOIN `contaazul-ssbi.gold_common.dim_date` AS dim_date ON dim_chatbot.nk_date = dim_date.nk_date WHERE (dim_chatbot.channel) IN ('Chat', 'Web', 'Whatsapp') AND (dim_chatbot.bot_departament) = 'Retenção' AND (((dim_date.nk_date) >= (DATE('2026-06-08')) AND (dim_date.nk_date) < (DATE('2026-06-13'))))

pergunta: Quantas avaliações positivas o chatbot recebeu no período de 08 a 12 de junho de 2026, no departamento Retenção, nos canais Chat, Web e Whatsapp?
gabarito_sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(dim_chatbot.sum_of_positive_ratings), 0) AS dim_chatbot_count_of_positive_ratings FROM `gold_serve.dim_chatbot` AS dim_chatbot LEFT JOIN `contaazul-ssbi.gold_common.dim_date` AS dim_date ON dim_chatbot.nk_date = dim_date.nk_date WHERE (dim_chatbot.channel) IN ('Chat', 'Web', 'Whatsapp') AND (dim_chatbot.bot_departament) = 'Retenção' AND (((dim_date.nk_date) >= (DATE('2026-06-08')) AND (dim_date.nk_date) < (DATE('2026-06-13'))))

pergunta: Quantas avaliações negativas o chatbot recebeu no período de 08 a 12 de junho de 2026, no departamento Retenção, nos canais Chat, Web e Whatsapp?
gabarito_sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(dim_chatbot.sum_of_negative_ratings), 0) AS dim_chatbot_count_of_negative_ratings FROM `gold_serve.dim_chatbot` AS dim_chatbot LEFT JOIN `contaazul-ssbi.gold_common.dim_date` AS dim_date ON dim_chatbot.nk_date = dim_date.nk_date WHERE (dim_chatbot.channel) IN ('Chat', 'Web', 'Whatsapp') AND (dim_chatbot.bot_departament) = 'Retenção' AND (((dim_date.nk_date) >= (DATE('2026-06-08')) AND (dim_date.nk_date) < (DATE('2026-06-13'))))

pergunta: Qual foi a taxa de retenção do chatbot (1 menos a razão entre transbordos e interações) no período de 08 a 12 de junho de 2026, no departamento Retenção, nos canais Chat, Web e Whatsapp? Responda como decimal entre 0 e 1.
gabarito_sql: SELECT GREATEST(1 - COALESCE(SUM(dim_chatbot.sum_of_transfers), 0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(SUM(dim_chatbot.sum_of_interactions), 0), 0), 0) AS dim_chatbot_pct_retention FROM `gold_serve.dim_chatbot` AS dim_chatbot LEFT JOIN `contaazul-ssbi.gold_common.dim_date` AS dim_date ON dim_chatbot.nk_date = dim_date.nk_date WHERE (dim_chatbot.channel) IN ('Chat', 'Web', 'Whatsapp') AND (dim_chatbot.bot_departament) = 'Retenção' AND (((dim_date.nk_date) >= (DATE('2026-06-08')) AND (dim_date.nk_date) < (DATE('2026-06-13'))))
